_note: ILLUSTRATIVE PLACEHOLDER -- NOT a real Whisp response. With the synthetic CI rasters this system reads painted data, not real satellite observations, so a comparison against a real Whisp run would not be a meaningful agreement metric and is never presented as one. These point_id -> Risk_PCrop labels are hand-set to the expected tri-state for each painted zone so the confusion-matrix tooling runs reproducibly. To obtain a genuine agreement number: fetch the real rasters/points via scripts/fetch_data.sh, re-run the engine, and refresh the Whisp side with WhispClient (the --refresh path).
